title: Amtech C1520 165mm (6.5") Long Nose Locking Pliers
features: DURABLE: This 250mm (10") long nose locking plier is made from strong, drop forged chrome molybdenum steel with a hardened and tempered wire cutter
VERSATILE: It has hardened, serrated tapered jaws for a better grip and a quick-release self-locking mechanism
SIZE CAPACITY: 5inch range ideal for plumbing and trade tasks
COMPACT DESIGN: Suitable for confined or hard-to-reach spaces
PLUMBING APPLICATIONS: Essential tool for household and trade pipework
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 6.5" Long Nose Locking Pliers - Cr-Mo See more
